chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.190 of 2017 Kraft Foods Schweiz Holding GmbH Versus Danpak Food Industries (Private) Limited DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1125/2017 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 17.04.2024 Khawaja Shoaib Mansoor, Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. It is claimed by the learned counsel for the appellant that since the parties have resolved their dispute amicably, therefore, he has been instructed not to press this appeal. He further submits that even the suit has also been disposed of through a compromise. The appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
